name: fullstack-starter
description: Fullstack Starter - Backend, Web, and Mobile

scripts.prepare: node -e "try { require.resolve('husky') } catch (e) { process.exit(0) }" && husky || true
scripts.dev:studio: concurrently -n studio-be,studio-fe -c blue,cyan "cd studio/backend && npm run dev" "cd studio/web && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:preview: concurrently -n preview-be,preview-fe -c magenta,green "cd preview/backend && npm run dev" "cd preview/web && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n studio-be,studio-fe,preview-be,preview-fe -c blue,cyan,magenta,green "cd studio/backend && npm run dev" "cd studio/web && npm run dev" "cd preview/backend && npm run dev" "cd preview/web && npm run dev"
